SOC/ROC assessment
NA = No non-epithelialized Stage II pressure ulcers are present at discharge CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1308_NBR_PRSULC_STG2 M1308 Number of Pressure Ulcers- Stage II This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage II (enter 0 if none). CHAR 2 x x x
M1308_NBR_STG2_AT_SOC_ROC M1308 Number of Pressure Ulcers- Stage II At SOC ROC This field indicates the current number of unhealed pressure ulcers at stage II that were present on admission
